subject: [PATCH v2 22/28] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic inode information in a CB_NOTIFY event, including attributes such as type, size, and timestamps. The information is obtained using the GETATTR operation and sent in the form of a JSON object. This allows clients to receive up-to-date file attributes without having to issue additional requests.
